typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DestinationTable as string (),
	PackageExecutionID as integer (),
	QueryInsertUnknownRecs as string (),
	QueryReadFromSource as string (),
	QueryReadFromSourceAG as string (),
	RowsDeleted as integer (),
	RowsDiscarded as integer (),
	RowsInserted as integer (),
	RowsNotWrittenError as integer (),
	RowsReadError as integer (),
	RowsReadNoError as integer (),
	RowsUpdated as integer (),
	AttributesFile as string (),
	ParentPackageExecutionID as integer ()
}

source(output(
		ProjectSalesOrderId as integer,
		Description as string,
		Address as string,
		City as string,
		ProvinceState as string,
		PostalZipCode as string,
		Country as string,
		CreatedDateTime as timestamp,
		CreatedDate as date,
		ProjectType as string,
		ProjectTypeDescription as string,
		ProjectTypeSort as integer,
		OrderType as string,
		Note as string,
		ProjectSalesOrderNumber as string,
		CustomerId as integer,
		CustomerShipToId as integer,
		InsideSalesUserCode as string,
		OutsideSalesUserCode as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'User::QueryReadFromSourceAG',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> ReadfromSource	source(output(
		SourceSK as string,
		EndMarketSK as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  	SourceSK = upper(SourceSK  )	,EndMarketSK = TargetSK FROM Stg.BCDimMappingVEL MP   WHERE MP.Shortcut Dimension Code=\'END MARKETS\'',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupEndMarketLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectTypeDesc as string,
		ProjectTypeGroup as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> LookupProjTypeAttrCacheLKPTABLE
ReadfromSource derive(ProjectSalesOrderId = ProjectSalesOrderId) ~> PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError
ReadfromSource derive() ~> ReadfromSourceErrorReformat
PlaceHolderRowsReadNoError,LookupProjTypeAttrCacheLKPTABLE lookup(ProjectTypeDescription == ProjectTypeDesc,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LookupProjTypeAttrCache
ReadfromSourceErrorReformat derive() ~> ReadfromSource0
LookupProjTypeAttrCache split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupProjTypeAttrCacheIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
ReadfromSource0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> ReadfromSourceERROROUTPUTFILE
LookupProjTypeAttrCacheIsMatch@Match derive(ETLCreateDate = $System__StartTime,
		ETLExecutionID = $User__PackageExecutionID,
		SourceSystemId = $Project__SourceSystemId,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + ProjectSalesOrderNumber)),
		ProjectTypeSK = toString((toString($Project__SourceSystemId) + '|' + upper(iifNull(ProjectType,'UNKNOWN')))),
		ProjectTypeGroup = iifNull(ProjectTypeGroup,toString('Unknown'))) ~> DeriveAuditandOtherColumns
DeriveAuditandOtherColumns,LookupEndMarketLKPTABLE lookup(ProjectTypeSK == SourceSK,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LookupEndMarket
LookupEndMarket split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupEndMarketIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupEndMarketIsMatch@LookupEndMarketIsMatchTOWritetoTargetLINK sink(input(
		ETLCreateDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Description as string,
		Address as string,
		InsideSalesUserCode as string,
		SourceSystemId as long,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK as string,
		OutsideSalesUserCode as string,
		ProjectTypeSK as string,
		PostalZipCode as string,
		OrderType as string,
		ETLExecutionId as long,
		CustomerShipToId as integer,
		ProjectSalesOrderId as integer,
		City as string,
		CustomerId as integer,
		EndMarketSK as long,
		ProvinceState as string,
		ProjectTypeSort as integer,
		ProjectTypeGroup as string,
		ProjectType as string,
		Note as string,
		CreatedDate as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Country as string,
		ProjectTypeDescription as string,
		ProjectSalesOrderNumber as string,
		CreatedDateTime as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ETLCreateDate,
		Description,
		Address,
		InsideSalesUserCode,
		SourceSystemId,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK,
		OutsideSalesUserCode,
		ProjectTypeSK,
		PostalZipCode,
		OrderType,
		ETLExecutionId = ETLExecutionID,
		CustomerShipToId,
		ProjectSalesOrderId,
		City,
		CustomerId,
		EndMarketSK,
		ProvinceState,
		ProjectTypeSort,
		ProjectTypeGroup,
		ProjectType,
		Note,
		CreatedDate,
		Country,
		ProjectTypeDescription,
		ProjectSalesOrderNumber,
		CreatedDateTime)) ~> WritetoTarget
LookupEndMarketIsMatch@Match sink(input(
		EndMarketSK as long,
		ETLCreateDate as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ETLExecutionID as long,
		SourceSystemId as short,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK as string,
		ProjectTypeSK as string,
		ProjectTypeGroup as string,
		ProjectSalesOrderId as integer,
		Description as string,
		Address as string,
		City as string,
		ProvinceState as string,
		PostalZipCode as string,
		Country as string,
		CreatedDateTime as timestamp 'ect.format.datetime.hypen.4year2month2day2hour24mmnute2secondsdot6nanoseconds',
		CreatedDate as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ProjectType as string,
		ProjectTypeDescription as string,
		ProjectTypeSort as integer,
		OrderType as string,
		Note as string,
		ProjectSalesOrderNumber as string,
		CustomerId as integer,
		CustomerShipToId as integer,
		InsideSalesUserCode as string,
		OutsideSalesUserCode as string,
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	mapColumn(
		EndMarketSK,
		ETLCreateDate,
		ETLExecutionID,
		SourceSystemId,
		ProjectSalesOrderSK,
		ProjectTypeSK,
		ProjectTypeGroup,
		ProjectSalesOrderId,
		Description,
		Address,
		City,
		ProvinceState,
		PostalZipCode,
		Country,
		CreatedDateTime,
		CreatedDate,
		ProjectType,
		ProjectTypeDescription,
		ProjectTypeSort,
		OrderType,
		Note,
		ProjectSalesOrderNumber,
		CustomerId,
		CustomerShipToId,
		InsideSalesUserCode,
		OutsideSalesUserCode,
		{})) ~> OutputPlaceHolderProjectSalesOrderLkpCache
